creator: rysiek@isnic.is
text:
The devel/bats-core port has been updated and now... does not seem to contain any code:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=9ae814f71dd74cfbb58f4e51ea799aecd601227c

And because it was released into the ports tree, updating our systems effectively removed `bats`, leading to unexpected breakage.
